summary: The three /projects routes are now live and rendering correctly — a major improvement since yesterday. The /about page remains a bare placeholder, and the homepage LCP (7.3 s) continues to drag performance to 70, which is a known issue below the 85 threshold.

pages.visual_fingerprint: Full-page portfolio homepage with a teal-accented hero ('App' heading, 'Send me a message' CTA), four content sections (pillars, case studies, skills, contact form), and a dark teal footer — all sections visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

visual_findings: Page contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on an otherwise blank white canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present on either desktop or mobile.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Entirely blank white page with only the stub text 'This is an about page' in the upper-left corner and no other UI elements.

Fully styled projects index page with 'My Projects' heading, four project cards (Clinical Note Structurer, Screenshot → PrimeVue, Lease Diff Explainer, Paperwork → Calendar) in a 2-column desktop grid, and a dark contact footer — all content visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

Clinical Note Structurer detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 10/10 passing' badge, a two-column visit note / structured result interactive demo, disclaimer banner, expandable JSON and HIPAA notes accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

Screenshot → PrimeVue detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 5/5 passing' badge, a dashed-border image drop zone, three sample thumbnail cards (Login form, Analytics dashboard, Pricing page), a placeholder result panel, expandable accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

score_deltas: / performance 72 → 70 (within jitter, but remains below 85 — known LCP issue)
/ lcp_ms 7082 → 7304 (marginal regression, chronic slow LCP unchanged)
/about performance 96 → 82 (drop of 14 pts — LCP rose from 2454 ms to 3813 ms, likely due to page now loading site shell/nav)
top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 7.3 s, performance 70): identify and optimize or preload the hero image, and eliminate any render-blocking resources — this is the single highest-impact improvement remaining on an otherwise healthy site.
issue_title: /about page is still an empty placeholder — no real content
issue_body:
## /about is an unfinished placeholder

Both desktop and mobile screenshots show only the stub text **"This is an about page"** on a blank white canvas — no navigation, biography, photo, skills summary, or footer is rendered.

This has persisted across at least two consecutive audits (2026-07-03 and 2026-07-04).

### Impact
- Any visitor or recruiter who navigates to `/about` sees an empty page with no information.
- The page also has an SEO score of 83 (below the 85 threshold) and a performance drop from 96 → 82 today.

### Steps to reproduce
1. Visit https://dliamkin.com/about on desktop or mobile.
2. Observe that only the placeholder text is rendered.

### Suggested fix
Replace the stub with real about-page content (bio, photo, skills summary, links) using the same layout shell as the rest of the site, including nav and contact footer.
